---
id: set-vrm-expressions
title: "Set VRM expressions"
description: "Replace all expression weights for the specified VRM model. Expressions not included are reset to 0."
sidebar_label: "Set VRM expressions"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/api/homunculus-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Set VRM expressions"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/expressions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Replace all expression weights for the specified VRM model. Expressions not included are reset to 0.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
